definitions.text: To lose one’s traction on a slippery surface; to slide due to a lack of friction.
To accidentally reveal a secret or otherwise say something unintentionally.
An act or instance of slipping.
examples: I had a slip on the ice and bruised my hip.

definitions.text: A woman's undergarment worn under a skirt or dress to conceal unwanted nudity that may otherwise be revealed by the skirt or dress itself; a shift.
A twig or shoot; a cutting.
A young person (now usually with of introducing descriptive qualifier).
examples: She couldn't hurt a fly, young slip of a girl that she is.

definitions.text: A thin, slippery mix of clay and water.
